info.name: IE Core – Medication Request & Dispensing Scenarios
info.description:
A comprehensive Postman collection for testing IE Core FHIR medication request and dispensing scenarios against a FHIR R4 server. Covers:

**Scenario 1** – Local IE: Full Dispensing of a Single Prescription (Metformin 500mg)
**Scenario 2** – Local IE: Partial Dispensing over 3 months (Atorvastatin 20mg)
**Scenario 3** – Multiple Prescriptions in a Single Bundle (Metformin + Atorvastatin + Ramipril)
**Scenario 4** – Cross-border IE→ES: Irish patient's prescription dispensed in Spain via MyHealth@EU
**Scenario 5** – Cross-border ES→IE: Spanish patient's prescription dispensed in Ireland via MyHealth@EU
**Scenario 6** – Repeat Prescription: 6-month GMS repeat with monthly dispensations

**Prerequisites:**
- Set the `baseUrl` environment variable to your FHIR server base URL (e.g. `http://hapi.fhir.org/baseR4` or `https://your-fhir-server/fhir`)
- The server must support FHIR R4

**Aligned with:** HL7 Ireland IE Core IG (http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core), HL7 Europe MPD IG, MyHealth@EU / eHDSI

variable.description: FHIR server base URL. Change to your target server.

request.description: Retrieve the server CapabilityStatement to verify the server supports MedicationRequest and MedicationDispense resources.

item.name: 1 – Scenario 1: Full Dispensing (Local IE)
item.description: Irish patient John Murphy receives a Metformin 500mg prescription from Dr. Sarah O'Brien (GP, St. James's Hospital) and collects the full 60 tablets at Boots Pharmacy, Dublin on the same day.

request.description: Create the Irish patient John Murphy with IHI and GMS identifiers.

body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "MedicationRequest",
  "meta": {"profile": ["http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/StructureDefinition/ie-core-medicationrequest-eprescription"]},
  "identifier": [{"system": "http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/sid/pcrs-rx", "value": "PCRS-RX-2024-001001"}],
  "status": "active",
  "intent": "order",
  "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medicationrequest-category", "code": "community", "display": "Community"}]}],
  "medicationReference": {"reference": "Medication/{{medicationId}}"},
  "subject": {"reference": "Patient/{{patientId}}", "display": "John Murphy"},
  "authoredOn": "2024-06-15",
  "requester": {"display": "Dr. Sarah O'Brien"},
  "reasonCode": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "44054006", "display": "Diabetes mellitus type 2"}]}],
  "dosageInstruction": [{
    "sequence": 1,
    "text": "Take one 500mg tablet twice daily with meals",
    "timing": {"repeat": {"frequency": 2, "period": 1, "periodUnit": "d"}},
    "route": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "26643006", "display": "Oral route"}]},
    "doseAndRate": [{"doseQuantity": {"value": 500, "unit": "mg", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "mg"}}]
  }],
  "dispenseRequest": {
    "validityPeriod": {"start": "2024-06-15", "end": "2024-07-15"},
    "numberOfRepeatsAllowed": 0,
    "quantity": {"value": 60, "unit": "tablets", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "{tablet}"},
    "expectedSupplyDuration": {"value": 30, "unit": "days", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "d"}
  },
  "substitution": {"allowedBoolean": true}
}

request.description: Create the ePrescription for Metformin 500mg (60 tablets, 30-day supply).

body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "MedicationDispense",
  "meta": {"profile": ["http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/StructureDefinition/ie-core-medicationdispense-edispensation"]},
  "identifier": [{"system": "http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/sid/dispense-id", "value": "DISP-IE-2024-001001"}],
  "status": "completed",
  "medicationReference": {"reference": "Medication/{{medicationId}}"},
  "subject": {"reference": "Patient/{{patientId}}", "display": "John Murphy"},
  "performer": [{"actor": {"display": "Niamh Brennan (Pharmacist)"}}],
  "authorizingPrescription": [{"reference": "MedicationRequest/{{prescriptionId}}"}],
  "type": {"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode", "code": "DF", "display": "Daily Fill"}]},
  "quantity": {"value": 60, "unit": "tablets", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "{tablet}"},
  "daysSupply": {"value": 30, "unit": "days", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "d"},
  "whenPrepared": "2024-06-15T14:00:00+01:00",
  "whenHandedOver": "2024-06-15T14:15:00+01:00",
  "dosageInstruction": [{"text": "Take one 500mg tablet twice daily with meals"}],
  "substitution": {"wasSubstituted": false}
}

request.description: Record the full dispensation of 60 Metformin tablets.
Search for completed dispenses for John Murphy.

item.name: 2 – Scenario 2: Partial Dispensing
item.description: Atorvastatin 20mg prescription dispensed in 3 partial fills of 30 tablets each across 3 months.

    "coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "373444002", "display": "Atorvastatin"}],

  },

  "performer": [{"actor": {"display": "Niamh Brennan (Pharmacist)"}}],

item.name: 3 – Scenario 3: Multiple Prescriptions Bundle
item.description: POST a full Bundle containing 3 prescriptions (Metformin, Atorvastatin, Ramipril) and their dispenses for John Murphy in a single transaction.

request.description: POST a FHIR transaction bundle containing 3 prescriptions (Metformin, Atorvastatin, Ramipril) in a single request. All prescriptions share the same groupIdentifier.

item.name: GET – Search Prescriptions by Group Identifier

request.description: Search all prescriptions belonging to the same GP prescription group (issued together in one consultation).

item.name: 4 – Scenario 4: Cross-border IE → ES
item.description: Irish patient Ciarán Walsh travels to Spain. His Irish GP's Amlodipine repeat prescription is transmitted to a Spanish pharmacy via MyHealth@EU.

request.description: Create the Irish cross-border ePrescription (includes MyHealth@EU cross-border identifier).

body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "MedicationDispense",
  "meta": {"profile": ["http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/StructureDefinition/ie-core-medicationdispense-edispensation"]},
  "identifier": [{"system": "http://www.mscbs.gob.es/fhir/sid/dispensacion", "value": "ES-DISP-2024-XB-004001"}],
  "status": "completed",
  "medicationCodeableConcept": {
    "coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "386864001", "display": "Amlodipine"}],
    "text": "Amlodipine 5mg tablets (ES generic)"
  },
  "subject": {"display": "Ciarán Walsh (Irish patient, visiting Spain)"},
  "performer": [{"actor": {"display": "Dra. Carmen Vega Soto, Farmacia Avenida de América, Madrid ES"}}],
  "authorizingPrescription": [{"reference": "MedicationRequest/{{crossborderPrescriptionId}}", "display": "PCRS-RX-2024-004001 (IE→ES cross-border)"}],
  "type": {"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode", "code": "DF", "display": "Daily Fill"}]},
  "quantity": {"value": 30, "unit": "tablets", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "{tablet}"},
  "daysSupply": {"value": 30, "unit": "days", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "d"},
  "whenHandedOver": "2024-07-28T11:45:00+02:00",
  "dosageInstruction": [{"text": "Tomar un comprimido de 5mg una vez al día (Take one 5mg tablet once daily)"}],
  "substitution": {
    "wasSubstituted": true,
    "type": {"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-substanceAdminSubstitution", "code": "G", "display": "Generic composition"}]},
    "reason": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "373873005", "display": "Pharmaceutical / biologic product"}]}]
  }
}

request.description: Record the Spanish pharmacy dispensation. The Spanish pharmacist dispensed a locally available generic equivalent (wasSubstituted=true, type=G).

item.name: 5 – Scenario 5: Cross-border ES → IE
item.description: Spanish patient María García López visits Ireland and presents her Spanish prescription for Amlodipine 5mg at Boots Pharmacy Dublin.

body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "Patient",
  "meta": {"profile": ["http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/StructureDefinition/ie-core-patient"]},
  "identifier": [
    {"system": "http://www.mscbs.gob.es/fhir/sid/cip", "type": {"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203", "code": "NI"}]}, "value": "ES280000000000000012"},
    {"system": "urn:oid:1.3.6.1.4.1.36764", "type": {"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203", "code": "PN"}]}, "value": "ES-28-12345678X"}
  ],
  "active": true,
  "name": [{"use": "official", "family": "García López", "given": ["María", "Concepción"], "prefix": ["Sra."]}],
  "gender": "female",
  "birthDate": "1975-08-22",
  "address": [{"use": "home", "line": ["Calle Gran Vía 45, 2º A"], "city": "Madrid", "postalCode": "28013", "country": "ES"}],
  "communication": [{"language": {"coding": [{"system": "urn:ietf:bcp:47", "code": "es"}]}, "preferred": true}]
}

request.description: Create the Spanish patient record in the Irish FHIR server (as received via MyHealth@EU).

item.name: POST – Record Irish Dispensation of Spanish Prescription

body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "MedicationDispense",
  "meta": {"profile": ["http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/StructureDefinition/ie-core-medicationdispense-edispensation"]},
  "identifier": [{"system": "http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/sid/dispense-id", "value": "DISP-IE-2024-XB-005001"}],
  "status": "completed",
  "medicationCodeableConcept": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "386864001"}], "text": "Amlodipine 5mg tablets"},
  "subject": {"reference": "Patient/{{esPatientId}}", "display": "María García López"},
  "performer": [{"actor": {"display": "Niamh Brennan, Boots Pharmacy Dublin IE"}}],
  "authorizingPrescription": [{"reference": "MedicationRequest/{{esPrescriptionId}}", "display": "ES-RX-2024-28-987654321 (ES→IE cross-border)"}],
  "type": {"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode", "code": "DF", "display": "Daily Fill"}]},
  "quantity": {"value": 30, "unit": "tablets", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "{tablet}"},
  "daysSupply": {"value": 30, "unit": "days", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "d"},
  "whenHandedOver": "2024-08-12T14:15:00+01:00",
  "dosageInstruction": [{"text": "Take one 5mg tablet once daily"}],
  "substitution": {"wasSubstituted": false}
}

item.name: 6 – Scenario 6: Repeat Prescription (6-month GMS)
item.description: 6-month GMS repeat prescription for Metformin 500mg with monthly dispensations.

body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "MedicationRequest",
  "meta": {"profile": ["http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/StructureDefinition/ie-core-medicationrequest-eprescription"]},
  "identifier": [{"system": "http://hl7.hse.ie/fhir/ie/core/sid/pcrs-rx", "value": "PCRS-RX-2024-006001"}],
  "status": "active",
  "intent": "order",
  "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medicationrequest-category", "code": "community"}]}],
  "medicationCodeableConcept": {"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "372567009", "display": "Metformin"}], "text": "Metformin 500mg tablets"},
  "subject": {"reference": "Patient/{{patientId}}"},
  "authoredOn": "2024-01-10",
  "requester": {"display": "Dr. Sarah O'Brien"},
  "reasonCode": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://snomed.info/sct", "code": "44054006", "display": "Diabetes mellitus type 2"}]}],
  "dosageInstruction": [{"text": "Take one 500mg tablet twice daily with meals"}],
  "dispenseRequest": {
    "validityPeriod": {"start": "2024-01-10", "end": "2024-07-10"},
    "numberOfRepeatsAllowed": 5,
    "quantity": {"value": 60, "unit": "tablets", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "{tablet}"},
    "expectedSupplyDuration": {"value": 30, "unit": "days", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "d"}
  },
  "substitution": {"allowedBoolean": true}
}

item.name: GET – Dispense History for Repeat Prescription

request.description: Retrieve all dispenses linked to the repeat prescription to see the complete dispensing history.

item.name: 7 – Validation Queries
item.description: General validation queries for medication resources.

request.description: Search for a specific prescription by its PCRS identifier.
